title: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Master the fundamental data structures and algorithmic paradigms every software engineer must know.

title: Operating Systems
description: Deep dive into OS internals: process management, threading, memory virtualization, file systems, and I/O.

title: Computer Networks
description: Comprehensive study of networking from physical to application layer.

title: برمجة سي بلس بلس (Programming in C++)
description: دراسة متعمقة في لغة سي بلس بلس، من الأساسيات إلى المؤشرات وإدارة الذاكرة.

title: البرمجة كينونية التوجه (OOP)
description: إتقان مفاهيم البرمجة كينونية التوجه باستخدام C++ لبناء أنظمة برمجية متينة ومستدامة.

title: مقدمة في الذكاء الاصطناعي (Intro to AI)
description: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence concepts, logic, search algorithms, and basic knowledge representation.

title: تعلم الآلة (Machine Learning)
description: Learn to build, train, evaluate, and deploy ML models using Python, scikit-learn, and PyTorch.

title: أمن الشبكات (Network Security)
description: Understand network vulnerabilities, firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion detection systems.

title: التشفير (Cryptography)
description: Mathematical foundations for modern cryptography: symmetric, asymmetric encryption, RSA, and hashing.

title: الشبكات العصبية (Neural Networks)
description: Deep Learning architectures, CNNs, RNNs, and transformer models for advanced AI applications.

title: إدارة قواعد البيانات (Database Management)
description: Enterprise database design, SQL optimization, and NoSQL solutions for modern business intelligence.

title: تحليل وتصميم النظم (Systems Analysis)
description: Methodologies for analyzing business requirements and modeling robust architectural information systems.
